[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Daclo Koat-xi''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Intelligence Operations Command]]. Koat-xi commanded one of the three field command teams reporting to [[Brigadier]] [[Colin Darkmere]] following [[Operation Shadow Hand]].<ref name="FC" />
